internal.content:
---
title: Citizen Engagement 8.3.1 is now available
description: Citizen Engagement 8.3.1 is now available
---


As of 23rd July 2026 all releases will have product documentation on S-Drive. 
In addition, documentation for 8.2.2.0 (3rd July 2026) and Curam Action View 1.0.0 (25th June 2026) will also be availale on S-Drive

### To avail of any information on this page, please contact [Merative Support](https://merative.my.site.com/mysupport/s/) 

Citizen Engagement v8.3.1 is now available for customers on Cúram v8.2.2, v8.1.3, v8.0.3, v8.0.2, v7.0.11, and v7.0.10..
This release includes accessibility fixes in the WebApp and the Design System.

For more information on this release, see the:
- 8.3.1 Universal Access Web Application guide 
- 8.3.1 Design System guide
